title: Enhance Renode LoRa model for complete TX/RX fidelity, timing, and SPI easyDMA compatibility
description: Update SX1262.cs or lichen/drivers/lora/lora_renode.c and Renode .resc scripts to fix RX issues, easyDMA, CS handling, FICR values per validation notes from 2026-07-07. Ensure full interoperability with lichen-sim RF propagation. Include test vectors validation.
close_reason: Enhanced SX1262.cs with full easyDMA/CS handling, RX polling fixes, TCP bridge to lichen-sim; lora_renode.c updated for fidelity. All test vectors pass.
